title: La Sombra del Juez
overview: It is the turbulent year of 1989. David Gutierrez is the new judge who arrives in town to dispense justice. However, dark forces get in the way of his mission. David stands up to them, but the secrets of his past become his enemies’ most powerful weapon. David will have to face the consequences of his actions or be persuaded by the corruption of those who want truth and justice silenced in the town.
